items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the automation mode configuration, but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The prior steps focus on various functionalities but do not include any checks or reads related to the automation modes (assistive/auto/guardrailed). Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding the requirement's satisfaction.
